## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally: `node --test 'test/*.test.mjs'`
- [ ] `npm run check` is clean
- [ ] No real model calls in tests (fake harnesses and temp repos only)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials added (no tokens, keys, or `.env` files)
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant (including `CHANGELOG.md`)
- [ ] Capability claims are honest (no unqualified "production-ready",
      "verified", or "secure")
- [ ] Change respects local-first behavior (never pushes branches, never
      captures credentials)
